revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''8-5-085

Alternative term: Multi-leg mooring

A mooring in which lines are taken to a number of points (anchors or sinkers) at the sea bed.


Note:

Other related self-explanatory terms are single-point or single-leg mooring, three-point or three-leg mooring, etc...

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Multi-point mooring}}
